title: Refactor to event-driven architecture
original_text: Refactored to event-driven architecture using message queues. Implemented event bus with RabbitMQ. Added event producers and consumers. Implemented event sourcing for audit trail. Added event replay for debugging. Implemented dead letter queue for failed events. Added event monitoring and alerting. Added tests for event flows. Result: 62 tests pass.
expected_body_lines: - Implement event sourcing for audit trail
- Add dead letter queue and monitoring
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(arch): migrate to event-driven architecture"
